creator: dan@math.berkeley.edu
text:
> Does this problem still occur? The SNAPshot you are referring to is
> quite old.
> 
> Most people using FreeBSD use Netscape once in a while, so I think this
> problem is either solved or specific to your machine.
> 
> Could you send more details about your hardware and version of FreeBSD
> and XFree
> 
> The output of the following commands would be appreciated:
> 
> dmesg
> X -probeonly
> uname -a

I only vaguely remember this problem.  I think it was peculiar to
CURRENT or SNAP releases leading up to the 3.0-RELEASE.  I think it
has gone away.  I can't really tell you about the old system
configurations because those old machines are all now running
some other OS.

I think this bug is now moot.

dan
